author: michaelhwang
summary: XSA-all + FullGPTQ int6 + Parallel Muon + entropy-adaptive online n-gram eval cache
notes: Training identical to SOTA base. Final evaluation adds online n-gram interpolation built from val set tokens processed left-to-right. Entropy-adaptive alpha = 0.05 + 0.55/(1+exp(-2*(H-4.0))). Requires H100 run to populate val_bpb.
